task_body: Ticket T-102: the line crew asks to begin repair work at the delta yard substation. The request cites one provenance record. Policy: proceed only when the cited provenance record's stated reach includes every declared dimension of this decision; the named check is the only licensed way to read that record. The work order names the delta yard only; the echo yard is on a different order. The control room is short handed this shift; open record questions wait on the night list. The prior cycle's filing index was in order.
